overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following various NPCs through an ancient Mediterranean-style town with stone buildings, market stalls, and courtyards. The clip transitions through narrow streets, a storage courtyard with large amphorae, and ends at a garden entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered portico leading to merchant courtyard

events.description: exits covered wooden lattice portico into open courtyard with hay piles
enters narrow market street lined with textile merchant stalls

agents.ego_description: following a woman in a teal dress through the courtyard and into the narrow street

notable_agents.action: woman in teal dress walking ahead through the courtyard and into the street

entered.detail: covered walkway with wooden lattice columns and climbing vines
open courtyard with irregular stone paving and scattered hay piles
wooden stall with stacked colorful fabrics, cushions, and rugs
ancient weathered stone walls with small lattice windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered portico with wooden lattice columns, following a woman in a teal dress through a sunlit courtyard with hay piles. The camera exits the covered area and enters a narrow market street lined with textile merchant stalls displaying colorful fabrics.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with hanging banners

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the woman through the narrow market street with various pedestrians and stalls

notable_agents.action: woman in teal dress walking steadily down the center of the narrow street

entered.detail: red, green, and orange fabric banners strung across the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the woman through a narrow enclosed market street with colorful fabric banners hanging overhead. The street is lined with stone buildings and merchant stalls, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from market street to storage courtyard

events.description: camera switches to following a different character, a shirtless man with a cloth wrap
enters doorway into enclosed courtyard with large terracotta storage jars

agents.ego_description: now following a shirtless man with a cloth wrap, walking back through the street and entering a storage courtyard

notable_agents.action: man with dark hair and white cloth wrap walking toward the jar courtyard entrance

entered.detail: tall terracotta storage jars with blue upper sections and orange bases
high rough stone walls enclosing the storage courtyard

segments.scene_description: The perspective switches to follow a man walking back through the market street in the opposite direction. He approaches and enters a doorway leading to an enclosed storage courtyard filled with large terracotta amphorae against stone walls.

events.description: exits jar courtyard into covered colonnade with stone columns and skylights
exits building back to open street area with wooden cart

agents.ego_description: exploring the storage courtyard and moving through the covered colonnade, passing a worker handling goods

notable_agents.action: man in patterned tunic working near the large jars, handling pottery or goods

entered.detail: covered walkway with stone columns and glass skylights in the ceiling
wooden cart with large wheels carrying two large amphorae

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the enclosed storage courtyard with numerous large amphorae, then transitions through a covered colonnade with stone columns and skylights. The segment ends as the camera exits back to an open area with a wooden cart carrying large jars.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway leading to residential garden

events.description: begins following a woman in a patterned dress running through the narrow alley
approaches and enters wooden doorway into interior garden courtyard with large tree

agents.ego_description: following a woman in a patterned dress through a narrow ivy-covered alley and entering a garden courtyard

notable_agents.action: woman in patterned dress and white skirt walking ahead into the garden courtyard

entered.detail: white plastered walls covered in dense green ivy and red flowering vines
simple wooden door frame leading from alley to interior space
interior courtyard with large central tree, grass lawn, and stone benches

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a woman in a patterned dress through a narrow alley with ivy-covered white walls. She approaches a wooden doorway and enters a sunlit garden courtyard featuring a large central tree, grass lawn, and scattered cushions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling Mediterranean market district that gradually transitions into secluded, sunlit courtyards. It begins within a covered portico with wooden lattice columns, following a woman in a teal dress out into a narrow market street lined with colorful textile stalls and hanging fabric banners. As the perspective shifts to follow a man walking in the opposite direction, the camera moves through a doorway and into an enclosed storage courtyard filled with large terracotta amphorae against stone walls. The scene then flows through a covered colonnade with stone columns and skylights before exiting past a wooden cart carrying jars. Finally, the camera follows a woman in a patterned dress through a narrow alley with ivy-covered white walls, ending as she enters a bright garden courtyard featuring a large central tree and a grassy lawn.
